## Problem

What user or workflow problem should this solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the improvement.

## Why it belongs here

Explain why this is part of Semantic Authority rather than a separate product or internal workflow.

## Additional context

Add examples, sample `MEANING.yaml`, or screenshots if helpful.
